positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. Focus on silhouetted, whimsical trees with bioluminescent roots and glowing mushrooms. The sky should feature a stylized crescent moon and scattered, abstract constellations forming geometric patterns. Color palette: Deep indigo, ethereal teal, muted lavender, and pops of neon aqua for the light sources. Composition: Symmetrical, central placement of the main trees, ideal for a square print repeat. Style: Vector-art mixed with stained glass aesthetic, sharp lines, high contrast, clean black outlines, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat design elements, high detail, rule of thirds composition, negative space utilization, vaporwave influence.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, cropped, disfigured, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, photorealism
